judgeScores.justification: The campaign maintains exceptional voice consistency across all six deliverables, weaving cohesive themes of calendar integration and circadian rhythm optimization throughout. It demonstrates strong audience insight by targeting specific remote worker pain points like the '3 PM energy crash' and video call anxiety while avoiding generic 'illuminate your workspace' clichés. The writing is polished and professional with credible statistics and platform-appropriate social content, though minor placeholder text like [Founder Name] in the press release slightly detracts from an otherwise launch-ready execution.
